description: Bifolio made of parchment. The main uses are literary. Reused on one page for accounts in Judaeo-Arabic mentioning someone named Berakha and goods such as wine. There is a nice repair of the parchment, where the original thread is still preserved.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
